zh.lifeSummary: 當Alice de Lusignan於1236年10月之後出生在法國波特-哈倫斯維安盧希南時，她的父親Hugues X de Lusignan Comte de la Marche8816歲，母親Isabelle d'Angoulême Queen of England8813歲。她於1247年8月與John de Warenne 6th Earl of Surrey在英國結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1256年2月9日在英國英格蘭素可沃倫，埋葬在英國英格蘭素可列維斯。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Lusignan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Normand, Andre, Francois, Lucien, Marcel.
French: habitational name from Lusignan, a place in Vienne. This surname is very rare in France. Compare   Zeno  .

History: Jean Miel (or Amiel) dit Lusignan from Lusignan in Vienne, France, married Marie-Thérèse Latouche in Boucherville, QC, in 1699. — A French family called (de) Lusignan became enormously powerful in the eastern Mediterranean during the Middle Ages. Guy de Lusignan (1129–94) was king of Cyprus from 1192 to 1194 (and before that, by right of marriage, king of the crusader state of Jerusalem). Hugues de Lusignan was king of Cyprus from 1267 to 1284 and king of Jerusalem from 1268 to 1284. During the 14th century, Lusignans became kings of the Armenian kingdom of Cilicia (on the Mediterranean coast of what is now Turkey, facing Cyprus).

variants.name: Zeno
meanings: Italian (mainly southern Italy), Hispanic (mainly Puerto Rico), and African American: from the personal name Zeno, classical Greek Zēnōn, a derivative of Zeus, the name of the king of the gods in Greek mythology. Zeno or Zenone is the name of a 4th-century Italian saint from Verona. As an African American name it was probably adopted in honor of the Stoic philosopher Zeno of Kition.

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

en.lifeSummary: When Alice de Lusignan was born after October 1236, in Lusignan, Vienne, Poitou-Charentes, France, her father, Hugues X de Lusignan Comte de la Marche, was 8816 and her mother, Isabelle d'Angoulême Queen of England, was 8813. She married John de Warenne 6th Earl of Surrey in August 1247, in England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. She died on 9 February 1256, in Warren, Sussex, England, United Kingdom, and was buried in Lewes, Sussex, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alice de Lusignan est née après octobre 1236, à Lusignan, Vienne, Poitou-Charentes, France, son père, Hugues X de Lusignan Comte de la Marche, avait 8816 ans et sa mère, Isabelle d'Angoulême Queen of England, avait 8813 ans. Elle a épousé John de Warenne 6th Earl of Surrey en août 1247, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 9 février 1256, à Warren, Sussex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, et a été enterrée à Lewes, Sussex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alice de Lusignan nach Oktober 1236 in Lusignan, Vienne, Poitou-Charentes, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Hugues X de Lusignan Comte de la Marche 8816 und ihre Mutter Isabelle d'Angoulême Queen of England 8813. Sie hat im August 1247 in England John de Warenne 6th Earl of Surrey geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 9. Februar 1256 in Warren, Sussex, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Lewes, Sussex, England, United Kingdom begraben.

ko.lifeSummary: Alice de Lusignan(이)가 1236년 10월 이후 프랑스 포이토우-처츠 비니 루시그난에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Hugues X de Lusignan Comte de la Marche(은)는 8816세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Isabelle d'Angoulême Queen of England(은)는 8813세였다. 그녀는 1247년 8월 영국에서 John de Warenne 6th Earl of Surrey(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1256년 2월 9일 영국 잉글랜드 수세스 워르에서 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 수세스 루스에 묻혔다.

pt.Fontrevault Abbey, Fontrevault, Maine-Et: Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, França
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alice de Lusignan nasceu após outubro de 1236, em Lusignan, Vienne, Poitou-Charentes, França, seu pai, Hugues X de Lusignan Comte de la Marche, tinha 8816 anos e sua mãe, Isabelle d'Angoulême Queen of England, tinha 8813 anos. Ela casou-se com John de Warenne 6th Earl of Surrey em agosto de 1247, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 9 de fevereiro de 1256, em Warren, Sussex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, e foi sepultada em Lewes, Sussex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.Fontrevault Abbey, Fontrevault, Maine-Et: меине-ет-лоир, пеис де ла лоир, Франция
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alice de Lusignan родилась после октябрь 1236 г. в местности лусигнан, виенн, поитоу-чарентесь, Франция, её отцу по имени Hugues X de Lusignan Comte de la Marche было 8816 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabelle d'Angoulême Queen of England, 8813. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John de Warenne 6th Earl of Surrey август 1247 г. в местности Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Она умерла 9 февраля 1256 г. в местности варрен, суссекс, Англия, Великобритания и была похоронена в местности львесь, суссекс, Англия, Великобритания.

Se casó con John de Warenne 6th Earl of Surrey en agosto de 1247, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió el 9 de febrero de 1256, en Warren, Sussex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, y fue sepultada en Lewes, Sussex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
